message:
Add extract-transcript.ts script for session export

- Discover Claude Code sessions by project name
- Filter sessions by date range (--since, --until)
- Export specific session or all sessions (--all)
- Use cass CLI for export with fallback to direct JSONL parsing
- Support merging multiple transcripts chronologically
- List mode (--list) to view available sessions
- Outputs to apps/web/src/data/transcript.json for "How It Was Made" page

Part of the transcript extraction pipeline:
  extract-transcript.ts → redact-transcript.ts → validate-publication.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
